root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as c_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.address, sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate, '' as as_letter, sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name, '' as as_commit_del, sc_cnt_m_coop.fax_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_district_a.district_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_district_a.post_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_province_a.province_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_district_b.district_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_district_b.post_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_province_b.province_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.present_address, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.present_road, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.present_tambol FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_ucf_district sc_mem_m_ucf_district_a, sc_mem_m_ucf_province sc_mem_m_ucf_province_a, sc_mem_m_ucf_district sc_mem_m_ucf_district_b, sc_mem_m_ucf_province sc_mem_m_ucf_province_b, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_district_a.province_code = sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_district_a.province_code = sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_district_b.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_province_b.province_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_province_a.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_district_a.province_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_district_b.province_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.district_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_district_b.district_code ) -- ( ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date between :adtm_resign1 and :adtm_resign2 ) ) /*WHERE*/
